venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room on Deck 4, Adam Tihany-designed. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Daily-changing menus with contemporary dishes; Thomas Keller-influenced recipes rotate through the menu. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant on Deck 5 aft. Buffet breakfast and lunch; themed dinner service with rotating international menus. The Colonnade also serves as the Earth & Ocean venue on select evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: Earth & Ocean
venues.description: A themed specialty dinner concept that takes over The Colonnade several times per voyage. Globally inspired eclectic menus; waiter service; staff in distinct outfits. Not a separate room — same Colonnade space transformed for the evening. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Patio
venues.description: Alfresco casual lunch venue, weather permitting, adjacent to the pool on Deck 5 aft. Light fare and casual dishes. Lunch-only on the expedition ships. Complimentary.

venues.name: Sushi in The Club
venues.description: Evening sushi service within The Club lounge on Deck 9 aft, typically 6–9 pm nightly. Fresh sushi and sashimi made to order — maki rolls, nigiri, and small plates. Complimentary.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: All-day café on Deck 6. Specialty coffees, freshly baked pastries, gourmet sandwiches, and artisan gelato made in-house. Complimentary.

venues.name: Pantry in the Bow Lounge
venues.description: Self-service light fare in The Bow Lounge on Deck 6 forward. Freshly prepared snacks, light bites, and refreshments throughout the day. Also a gathering point for the Expedition Team. Complimentary.

venues.name: Constellation Lounge
venues.description: Panoramic 270-degree forward lounge on Deck 9. Serves early-riser pastries and beverages in the morning, afternoon tea service mid-afternoon, and cocktail-time tapas in the evening. Complimentary.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. Full Restaurant menu served course-by-course during dinner hours, plus a dedicated in-suite menu available at all hours.
